title: callicarpa remotiflora
intro: Callicarpa remotiflora, also known as the purple fruit callicarpa or purple berry callicarpa, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its vibrant purple fruits and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Callicarpa remotiflora is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
